_comment: All four FlexNetOS-built local (stdio) MCP servers in one drop-in file. Requires `meta-mcp`, `weave`, `icm`, and `vox` on PATH. Merge into .claude/settings.json (Claude Code) or claude_desktop_config.json (Claude Desktop). For external npm-package servers (context7, playwright, n8n-mcp) see their per-server snippets; for remote claude.ai connectors, see snippets/claude-ai.mcp.json.
